name: Spirited Black-Eyed Peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried black-eyed peas overnight in beer. Do not drain.
2. In a large pot, combine the soaked peas, salt pork, Snap-E Tom, black pepper, salt, chopped onion, Worcestershire sauce, and dry mustard.
3. Cook the mixture over low heat, covered, for 1-1/2 hours. Add more beer as needed to keep the mixture moist.
4. Taste and add a small amount of Tabasco sauce if desired. Do not add water.
5. Adjust the amount of Worcestershire sauce to personal preference; halving it is an option since some may not like its flavor profile.
